emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 08/09/00
emails.body: Re: EOL Credit Responses 08/09/00 Is the City of Huntsville cleared to trade all products? From: Tana Jones@ECT on 10-08-2000 08:55 CDT

emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 08/09/00
emails.body: Re: EOL Credit Responses 08/09/00 Is the City of Huntsville cleared to trade all products? From: Tana Jones@ECT on 10-08-2000 08:55 CDT

emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 08/09/00
emails.body: No, the City of Huntsville is not approved for financial trading or physical power. FYI< with the US based customer list (online and offline), we will never approve a governmental entity for financial trading unless we have a master in place, or time to do some due diligence on their authority to enter into financial transactions. David Minns@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 08/10/2000 05:52 PM
